Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds
  • Class
    Description
    Array<T>
     
    Array.NonEmpty<T>
     
    Collection<T>
    The fundamental abstraction for all functional data structures in this library.
    Deque<T>
    A purely functional Double-Ended Queue (Deque).
    Deque.BankersDeque<T>
     
    Either<A,B>
    Represents a value of one of two possible types (a disjoint union).
    Either.Left<A,B>
     
    Either.Right<A,B>
     
    Generator
    Utility for generating infinite or sequential functional collections.
    Graph<V extends Comparable<V>>
    A purely functional Graph interface using an Adjacency Map representation.
    Graph.AdjacencyMapGraph<V extends Comparable<V>>
     
    HashMap<K,V>
    A persistent Hash Array Mapped Trie (HAMT) implementation.
    HashMap.CollisionNode
     
    HashMap.Entry<K,V>
     
    HashMap.HAMT<K,V>
     
    HashMap.IndexedNode
     
    HashMap.LeafNode
     
    HashMap.Node
     
    Lazy<T>
    A purely functional container for a deferred, memoized computation.
    LazyList<T>
    A purely functional Lazy List with deferred evaluation.
    LazyList.Empty<T>
     
    LazyList.NonEmpty<T>
     
    List<T>
    A purely functional Linked List (Snoc-list style).
    List.EmptyList<T>
     
    List.LinkedList<T>
     
    Map<K extends Comparable<K>,V>
    A purely functional Map interface.
    Map.BinaryTreeMap<K extends Comparable<K>,V>
     
    Map.Entry<K extends Comparable<K>,V>
     
    Maybe<T>
     
    Maybe.Nothing<T>
     
    Maybe.Some<T>
     
    PriorityQueue<T>
    A purely functional Priority Queue implemented as a Leftist Heap.
    PriorityQueue.LeftistHeap<T>
     
    Queue<T>
    A purely functional Queue (FIFO).
    Queue.BankersQueue<T>
     
    RoseTree<T>
    A purely functional Rose Tree (N-ary Tree).
    RoseTree.RoseTreeImpl<T>
     
    Set<T>
    A purely functional Set implementation using a self-balancing AVL Tree.
    Set.AVLTree<T>
     
    Set.Empty<T>
     
    Set.NonEmpty<T>
     
    Stack<T>
    A purely functional Stack (LIFO).
    Stack.Empty<T>
     
    Stack.NonEmpty<T>
     
    Task<A>
    A purely functional abstraction for an asynchronous computation.
    Tuple<A,B>
    A purely functional Tuple (Pair) of two values.
    Tuple.TupleImpl<A,B>
     
    Validation<E,T>
    A data type that represents either a success (Valid) or an accumulation of errors (Invalid).
    Validation.Invalid<E,T>
     
    Validation.Valid<E,T>
     
    Vector<T>
    Persistent Vector implementation using a Bitmapped Vector Trie.
    Vector.VectorImpl<T>
